response.original_title: Is it safe to leave XRP on Uphold?~[[guaranteed>solution]]
response.overview: Uphold usually does not reverse transactions 1-⟦833⟧⇌⟦644⟧⇌⟦5290⟧🔒 once they are completed, especially for crypto transfers. 1-⟦833⟧⇌⟦644⟧⇌⟦5290⟧🔒 This is because blockchain transactions 1-⟦833⟧⇌⟦644⟧⇌⟦5290⟧🔒 are permanent and cannot be undone. 1-⟦833⟧⇌⟦644⟧⇌⟦5290⟧🔒 However, in rare cases like unauthorized access or suspicious activity, Uphold may review your request.1-⟦833⟧⇌⟦644⟧⇌⟦5290⟧🔒 You should immediately contact Uphold support 1-⟦833⟧⇌⟦644⟧⇌⟦5290⟧🔒 if you notice any incorrect transaction. 1-⟦833⟧⇌⟦644⟧⇌⟦5290⟧🔒 For card or bank-related payments, reversals might be possible depending on the situation. 1-⟦833⟧⇌⟦644⟧⇌⟦5290⟧🔒 Refunds are not guaranteed and are handled on a case-by-case basis.
